field_values.action_summary: The travelers are ushered into guest rooms within the palace. They wait in a state of growing agitation, discussing their expectations and the Wizard's perceived power.
field_values.camera_intent: Interior medium shots of group interaction; Reaction shots for individual agitation; Montage coverage of lighting shifts and time passage
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Lighting must shift progressively to indicate time passing
Character positioning within guest quarters must remain consistent between temporal jumps
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH015_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the psychological weight of waiting within a high-status environment. Use lighting shifts to visually communicate the passage of time as the travelers transition from hopeful anticipation to agitated anxiety regarding the Wizard's power and their unfulfilled promises.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (weary traveler, white clothing)
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- palace_staff (Green-whiskered Soldier/Girl)

## Required Environments
- palace_of_oz (Guest Rooms)

## Continuity Constraints
- Lighting must shift progressively to indicate time passing.
- Character positioning within guest quarters must remain consistent between temporal jumps.

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival and settling in guest rooms.
- BT002: The passage of time through waiting.
- BT003: Growing agitation and discussion of the Wizard.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
